title: Khottabych
overview: Moscow schoolboy Volodya accidentally fishes out of the Moscow River a mysterious lamp, from which the genie Khottabych appears. He promises to fulfill any of his wishes, but each of them turns into unexpected consequences. Magic multiplies, rather than solves Volodya's problems. Nevertheless, the schoolboy is imbued with the genie's problems and, as a result, finds himself in the past, where Khottabych's daughter marries an unloved man. Trying to destroy this marriage and free Khottabych, Volodya and his friends go to an ancient Eastern wedding.

title: Death Always Craves
overview: The story follows a young pregnant woman who, upon visiting her ailing mother, finds herself trapped in a whirlwind of supernatural events and dark secrets that connect her to the mysterious past of the old residence.

title: The Wizard of the Emerald City, Part II
overview: The heroes journey to the Purple Country and confront the witch Bastinda.

title: Vedaat Marathe Veer Daudale Saat
overview: It shows the inspirational story of the extraordinary bravery of seven Maratha warriors of Maratha Empire to achieve dream of Swaraj in 1674.

title: Get to That Place
overview: A group of kids navigate their lives and interpersonal relationships while a rumor about the end of the world spreads around town.

title: Vampyr
overview: A struggling author, who is obsessed with Edvard Munch, finds himself on the verge of madness when he's dragged into a dangerous murder mystery that uncovers a horrifying truth about the world-famous painter, and potentially rewrites history as we know it.

title: Mr. Penguin: The Movie
overview: When unexplained events begin to occur, a hidden presence reveals itself. Silent, watchful, and growing closer—Mr. Penguin is no longer just a mystery.

title: The Unicorn That Said No
overview: In the Forest of Hearts, a little, sweepity, swoopity, swappity, sweet unicorn is born. But even though everyone is very lilacly-loving to it and constantly feeds it with sweet lucky clover, the little critter does not behave unicorn-like at all. It just keeps saying no, so soon its family just calls it uNOcorn. One day, the uNOcorn breaks out of its cotton candy world and sets off to NOWHERE. On the way, he unexpectedly meets a raccoon that refuses to listen (HUHcoon), a watchdog that doesn‘t seem to care about anything (SOWHATchdog), and princess that always talks back (PrinceYES). The four of them make a pretty good team. Because even being stubborn is much more fun together.

title: The Dream of a Ridiculous Man
overview: A man driven by isolation and a nihilistic view decides to end his own life, but on the evening of his fateful decision he has chance encounters with a woman on a bridge, a young girl in a cemetery, and a fantastical dream that challenges his own ideologies.

title: The Beginning of Her Reign
overview: A successful businessman longs for female domination. His secretary becomes his partner in a daring journey of love, power, and self-discovery, challenging societal norms and personal boundaries.

title: Rocky Wake
overview: Elise, long estranged from her mother Megan, visits her as she lies on her deathbed. Her mother recounts a life-changing moment from the early 80s, her father’s devastating diagnosis and a serial killer stalking the town. Elise reconstructs her mother’s memories, drawing them closer as the night unfolds.

title: Angel
overview: When a sex worker is consumed by the life of drugs and partying, accidentally overdosing, she embarks on a journey to better her life.

title: Ātaahua
overview: A lonely man seeks solace in an art gallery, but instead meets the face of death- Hinenui Te Pō

title: All Legs
overview: On their annual summer camp, a group of Boy Scouts are attacked in the woods by a creature with legs for arms.

title: I Fought the Law
overview: A contemporary punk-rock "hangout film".  Plot under wraps.

title: The Suffering Tenants
overview: The enemy, the lover and the brother of a missing landlady all become entangled in this Hitchcockian chamber play, set in the mid-70s.

title: Two Christmases, One Lesya
overview: As Christmas approaches, Lesya, a conveniance store clerk from Bila Cerkva, grows more and more frustrated as debts begin to swamp her and her parents once again start with a daily dosage of bickering. However, as the holiday season approaches, she gains the abbility to travel between parallel worlds in her sleep. Whilst in our reality she might be a nobody, on the other side she's a glamorous and wealthy TV star. Clock is ticking and Lesya must decide wheater she's going to stay in our world or leave it for the glamour of the other side.

title: The Curse of the Silver Chain
overview: A silver chain that appears for centuries made by warlocks in the 15th century.

title: The Inmate
overview: About an inmate who fears the outside world.

title: What We Owe to Each Other
overview: Plot unknown.

title: 'The Wokinator'
overview: Working title. Sci-Fi action film by Kirsten Paltzat.

title: The Heavy End
overview: Following the sudden passing of his wife, a devout church warden comes to question his lifelong devotion to the cause.

title: Brujo
overview: Plot unknown.

title: Enervo
overview: On the one-year death anniversary of her mother, Mikey is forced to face her inner demons while paralyzed as her guilt manifests itself into physical form.

title: Mascara
overview: After his wife's passing, an old man spends one last night in their home—before bidding an unforgettable farewell. Written & directed by Ahmed Said Ağaoğlu. In development.

title: Mouthwashing : The Film
overview: The Indian Film Adaptation Of The Bone-Chilling Video Game - Mouthwashing

title: Werwulf
overview: In medieval Britain, a mysterious creature lurks in the misty landscape, bringing ancient legends to life and transforming them into a terrifying reality, forcing the villagers to confront an ancient, supernatural threat.

title: Zac Power
overview: Zac Power’s position as the top teenage spy is compromised after a brilliant new agent arrives. When his recklessness allows an ostentatious supervillain to steal a high-tech weapon, Zac is forced to confront his own flaws and team up with his rival.

title: Gone Part Three
overview: The finale in the series. How will it end?

title: Citric Acid
overview: A young artist is stalked via the internet by a mysterious online celebrity who harshly criticizes their artwork.

title: You’ve Got Mail
overview: A mail deliverer is captured by Irish-American gangsters to launder money and drugs for them in this black comedy thriller.

title: Lappen: A Tragedy.
overview: Lappen is an ambitious actress — and a washcloth in a world dominated by humans. Despite her acting training, she fails to make a breakthrough at a small theater. Her appearance and the patriarchal environment confine her to minor roles. At the lowest point of her career, she decides to try her luck in the film industry.

title: Boss 2
overview: Sequel of 2013 film Boss

title: The Beekeeper 2
overview: The second installment in the franchise. Plot TBA.

title: Children of Blood and Bone
overview: Zelie and her older brother Tzain form an alliance with the king’s daughter, Princess Amari, and son, Prince Inan, to fight back against his brutal rule.

title: George Krish
overview: Action comedy entertainer

title: Perrydox
overview: A college student’s life is turned upside down when he wakes up to discover he has swapped places with an alternate version of himself from another universe

title: In the Absence of Choice
overview: When a loyal enforcer of a vampire order begins to remember the night his childhood ended, the truth waiting in the dark threatens to consume what’s left of him.

title: Animal Friends
overview: Two fugitive animals embark on an adventure across America to find the ranch that was once their home, healing their friendship while pursued by an equally "odd-couple" DEA agent and Fish and Wildlife ranger with something to prove.

title: Love and War
overview: A love story set against the backdrop of a war.

title: Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj
overview: Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj

title: Raging Moms - Am Ende der Geduld
overview: Amidst sweating attacks, sex escapades, existential fears and the unsuccessful fight against the signs of the times, four women search for happiness and find themselves.

title: House with Roman
overview: An upcoming romantic comedy with elements of fantasy about Ivanka, the owner of a coffee shop in the capital, who decides to sell her only inheritance—her grandmother's house in a small town in Podillia—to pay off her debts. Soon, the girl discovers that the house is inhabited by a house spirit named Roman, a young, seductive handsome man who will do anything to save the house from being sold.

title: The Third Parent
overview: A neighborhood Fourth of July celebration is interrupted by a ferociously bizarre anomaly who overpowers a family in order to teach them how to become better people and more compliant citizens.

title: Air Bud Returns
overview: 12-year-old Jacob is an aspiring basketball player coping with the recent loss of his father. After he and his mother move to his dad’s childhood home in Fernfield, Jacob discovers a VHS tape of his old man playing basketball on the same court as a hoops-shooting golden retriever. Soon, Jacob begins his own adventure with a neglected golden retriever that he names Buddy.

title: Dead Mountaineer's Hotel
overview: Police inspector Peter Glebski arrives at a small mountain hotel, "At the Dead Mountaineer's", after receiving an anonymous letter - the letter warns that a murder will be committed in the hotel. An avalanche that occurs in the evening blocks the only exit from the gorge, and at night Glebski discovers the body of one of the guests...

title: Neanderthal
overview: Fedor is a famous MMA champion who lost not only his reputation in the sports world, but also his family due to uncontrolled aggression. To change, he decides to go to Altai, but is accidentally transported to the primitive world 10,000 years before BC. The local aborigines mistake him for a warrior who will help them defeat their sworn enemy. Fedor understands that he is a weakling among the aborigines, so in the struggle it is necessary to use not force, but cunning and the ability to negotiate. Together with the shaman's daughter Reba, he goes to his main goal – to return home.

title: ZOMA
overview: A grieving mother seeks answers over her son’s death, which she believes may be linked to AI therapy app ZOMA. Defying her boss, an ambitious young attorney takes on the case, and soon finds herself battling not only the tech firm NuvoMind and its formidable legal team but also an algorithm that seems to understand the human psyche better than humans themselves.

title: Inside That House
overview: After a number of strange disappearances have been reported in the area, Andrew and Jason, two brothers who received a drone for graduation, decide to film around their town to learn more about them, but then become distracted by a new girl in school who lives nearby. The two boys devise a plan to sneak their drone through an open window of her home, only to discover a terrible, dark secret.

title: The Stars That Fade
overview: After a tragic loss, a writer seeks comfort in publishing an anthology of horror stories. As his mental state deteriorates, his imagination blends with reality and tragedy seems imminent.
